full_text:
Zhao Wen (Zirou) 趙溫 (子柔)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Wen (趙溫), styledZirou (子柔), was born in Shu. Infuriated Cao Cao by nominating Cao Pi and sacked. Zhao Wen was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Dong Zhuo, Li Jue, and the Wei Kingdom. Zhao Wen lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
